problemHeadline: Plan a 3-day Tokyo trip in seconds

aiAnswerBlocks.title: Day 1 · Shibuya + Harajuku
aiAnswerBlocks.text: Morning: check in · Afternoon: Shibuya Crossing, Hachiko, Harajuku · Evening: ramen · Food ¥3,000-4,500

aiAnswerBlocks.title: Day 2 · Asakusa + Ueno
aiAnswerBlocks.text: Morning: Senso-ji Temple · Afternoon: Nakamise, Ueno Park · Evening: izakaya · Food ¥3,500-5,000

aiAnswerBlocks.title: Day 3 · Shinjuku + Shopping
aiAnswerBlocks.text: Morning: Shinjuku Gyoen · Afternoon: Lumine, Don Quijote · Evening: sushi dinner · Shopping ¥5,000-15,000

ctaDay1: Day 1 · Shibuya + Harajuku · ramen + street snacks
